title: Covert Activities Cadre
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Janos_Marsh.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Janos Marsh]], member of the Covert Activities Cadre.]]
The '''Covert Activities Cadre''' was formed by [[House Melantha]], rulers of the [[Melantha Province]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]], to secretly further the interests of the house. The most well known operative of the Cadre was [[Janos Marsh]], who served on [[Scout ship/Legends|scout vessel]] ''[[Bright Seeker]]'', belonging to [[House Calipsa]]. Marsh was working to keep House Calipsa from locating a new trade route.
